settings.html:
<script>

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  let dmHeading = document.querySelectorAll('.dm-heading');

  dmHeading.forEach((dmHeadingElement, index) => {
    let splitHeading = new SplitType(dmHeadingElement.querySelector('h2'));

    gsap.from(splitHeading.words, {
      scrollTrigger: {
        trigger: dmHeadingElement,
        scroller: 'body',
        start: 'top 60%'
      },
      y: 30,
      opacity: 0,
      duration: 0.3,
      stagger: 0.1
    });
  });
});

</script>

settings.title: The vision and mission guiding everything we build.

settings.html:
Our Mission

Give each individual the quality of life and time they deserve for a lifetime.

Our Vision

To be the world's best company shaping the technology more to its silver lining..
